mechanism_narrative: Sustained strength in real retail sales (RSAFS) predicts positive demand-driven earnings revisions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces non-positive 20-day returns in more than 50% of months when RSAFS is in its top historical quartile.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 7.0% and declines by at least 0.1 percentage point month-over-month, improving labor market conditions reduce equity risk premiums, generating positive 60-day S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns are negative or zero in more than 45% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 7% and falls by at least 0.1pp.

mechanism_narrative: A near-zero federal funds rate combined with elevated headline inflation produces deeply negative real interest rates that force capital reallocation into equities, driving positive 20-day S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term of FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL delivers a Rank IC below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window during low-rate regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production momentum during an early-cycle recovery from a trough predicts positive risk-asset repricing, generating positive 5-day S&P 500 forward returns as manufacturing activity rebounds.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum fails to coincide with positive 5-day SPX returns in more than 50% of early-cycle months.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 800 thousand units signal durable construction demand recovery that translates into positive 60-day S&P 500 forward returns through housing-sensitive sector earnings expansion.
failure_condition: Mean SPX 60-day return following HOUST levels above 800k is less than or equal to zero over the triggered sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth alongside elevated unemployment captures a high-slack labor market recovery that supports consumption without triggering wage inflation fears, producing positive 20-day S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: A linear interaction term between PAYEMS changes and UNRATE levels produces a negative or statistically insignificant coefficient (p > 0.05) predicting 20-day SPX returns.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate anchored below 0.25% stabilizes short-term discount rates and suppresses equity volatility, creating positive 5-day S&P 500 drift.
failure_condition: Mean 5-day SPX returns during FEDFUNDS below 0.25% do not exceed returns during FEDFUNDS above 2% by at least 10 basis points annualized.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP prints above 13.5 trillion chained 2017 dollars confirm exit from deep contraction and drive positive 60-day S&P 500 forward returns as corporate revenue growth inflects.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns following GDPC1 above 13500 are negative in the majority of subsequent quarters.
